support.title: Help Center

support.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. Technical issue, question about my plan...

faq.modifyProgramAnswer: Go to Dashboard > Update my plan
faq.cantDoExerciseAnswer: Click 'Alternative' during your session to see other options
faq.personalizedPlansAnswer: Yes! Each plan is generated based on your info (age, goal, equipment, etc.)

tarif.title: Coaching that adapts to you
tarif.subtitle: Every week, your program evolves based on your feedback. Choose the plan that fits you.
tarif.promoInvalidDesc: This promo code doesn't exist or has expired.
tarif.trialNoCharge: You won't be charged until after the 7-day trial
tarif.readyToTransformDesc: Join hundreds of members who have already started their transformation with Pulse.

features.autoAdjust: Automatic adjustments based on your progress

allFeatures: Personalized sport program adapted to your level
Detailed nutrition plan with macro calculation
AI nutritionist Julie for all your meals
Automatic adjustments based on your progress
Library of healthy and balanced recipes

billing.a: For weekly subscription: immediately. For monthly and annual plans: after the 7-day free trial. If you cancel during the trial, no amount will be charged.

cancel.a: Yes, absolutely! You can cancel anytime from your settings. Cancellation is one click. For plans with a trial, you can cancel during the 7 days at no cost.

promo.q: How to use a promo code?
promo.a: Enter your promo code in the dedicated field before confirming. The discount will be automatically applied to your first payment (after the free trial for eligible plans).

access.a: You'll have immediate and complete access to your personalized program. You can start your first training session right away and follow your nutrition plan.

refund.a: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee. If our program doesn't suit you, contact us for a full refund.
